DICETOWER.Menu.DiceConfig.Name: Dice Tower Configuration
DICETOWER.Menu.DiceConfig.Label: Open Dice Tower Configuration
DICETOWER.Menu.DiceConfig.Hint: Configure appearance, behavior, and special effects for Dice Tower.
DICETOWER.Menu.DiceConfig.Title: Dice Tower Configuration
DICETOWER.Menu.DiceConfig.SFX.Hint: Use comma-separated values in On Result, for example: 20, kh.
DICETOWER.Menu.RollableAreaConfig.Name: Rollable Area
DICETOWER.Menu.RollableAreaConfig.Label: Configure Rollable Area
DICETOWER.Menu.RollableAreaConfig.Hint: Restrict dice rolls to a custom region of the viewport.
DICETOWER.Menu.RollableAreaConfig.Title: Rollable Area
DICETOWER.Notifications.RuntimeNotReady: Dice Tower runtime is not ready yet.
DICETOWER.Notifications.PreviewNoDice: Preview formula did not produce any dice terms.
DICETOWER.Notifications.PreviewFailed: Failed to preview roll. Check the formula and console for details.
DICETOWER.MigrationWelcome.Title: Welcome to Dice Tower
DICETOWER.MigrationWelcome.Body.Line1: Dice Tower imported your Dice So Nice preferences and is ready to roll.
DICETOWER.MigrationWelcome.Body.Line2: Open the configuration panel to review appearance presets, SFX, and performance options.
DICETOWER.MigrationWelcome.Body.Line3: This message is shown once per user and world.
DICETOWER.Settings.maxDiceNumber.Name: Max Dice Number
DICETOWER.Settings.maxDiceNumber.Hint: Maximum number of dice that can be rendered in one animation.
Disable 3D dice while combat is active.
DICETOWER.Settings.hide3dDiceOnSecretRol: Hide 3D dice for blind, GM, and whispered rolls.
DICETOWER.Settings.showGhostDice.Name: Show Ghost Dice For Hidden Rolls
DICETOWER.Settings.showGhostDice.Hint: Show hidden rolls as ghost dice when possible.
DICETOWER.Settings.hideNpcRolls.Name: Hide NPC Rolls
DICETOWER.Settings.hideNpcRolls.Hint: Do not animate rolls made by NPC actors.
DICETOWER.Settings.animateRollTable.Name: Animate Roll Table Rolls
DICETOWER.Settings.animateRollTable.Hint: Animate rolls generated by roll tables.
DICETOWER.Settings.animateInlineRoll.Hin: Animate inline roll results in chat content.
DICETOWER.Settings.enabledSimultaneousRo: Combine close-in-time rolls into one animation sequence.
Combine rolls from the same chat message into one animation.
DICETOWER.Settings.enableDeterministicSy: Broadcast throw parameters so all clients replay the same physics trajectory.
DICETOWER.Settings.formatVersion.Name: Data Format Version
DICETOWER.Settings.enabled.Name: Enabled
DICETOWER.Settings.enabled.Hint: Enable Dice Tower for this client.
DICETOWER.Settings.showExtraDice.Name: Show Extra Dice
DICETOWER.Settings.onlyShowOwnDice.Name: Only Show Own Dice
DICETOWER.Settings.onlyShowOwnDice.Hint: Only animate rolls made by your own user.
DICETOWER.Settings.hideAfterRoll.Name: Hide After Roll
DICETOWER.Settings.hideAfterRoll.Hint: Automatically hide the dice canvas after rolls settle.
DICETOWER.Settings.timeBeforeHide.Name: Time Before Hide (ms)
DICETOWER.Settings.timeBeforeHide.Hint: Delay before auto-hide after animation completes.
DICETOWER.Settings.hideFX.Name: Hide Effect
DICETOWER.Settings.hideFX.Hint: Visual effect used when clearing dice.
DICETOWER.Settings.autoscale.Name: Autoscale
DICETOWER.Settings.autoscale.Hint: Automatically scale dice to viewport size.
DICETOWER.Settings.scale.Name: Scale
DICETOWER.Settings.speed.Name: Speed
DICETOWER.Settings.imageQuality.Name: Image Quality
DICETOWER.Settings.shadowQuality.Name: Shadow Quality
DICETOWER.Settings.bumpMapping.Name: Bump Mapping
DICETOWER.Settings.bumpMapping.Hint: Use bump and normal maps on supported materials.
DICETOWER.Settings.sounds.Name: Sounds
DICETOWER.Settings.sounds.Hint: Play collision sounds for dice impacts.
DICETOWER.Settings.soundsSurface.Name: Sound Surface
DICETOWER.Settings.soundsSurface.Hint: Surface material used for collision sound selection.
DICETOWER.Settings.soundsVolume.Name: Sound Volume
DICETOWER.Settings.canvasZIndex.Name: Canvas Z-Index
DICETOWER.Settings.canvasZIndex.Hint: Render dice overlay above or below the Foundry canvas.
DICETOWER.Settings.throwingForce.Name: Throwing Force
DICETOWER.Settings.useHighDPI.Name: Use High DPI
DICETOWER.Settings.useHighDPI.Hint: Render at full device pixel ratio.
DICETOWER.Settings.antialiasing.Name: Antialiasing
DICETOWER.Settings.antialiasing.Hint: Antialiasing mode for the dice renderer.
DICETOWER.Settings.glow.Name: Glow
DICETOWER.Settings.showOthersSFX.Name: Show Other Players' Special Effects
DICETOWER.Settings.showOthersSFX.Hint: Display SFX configured by other users.
DICETOWER.Settings.immersiveDarkness.Hin: Dim the scene while dice are rolling.
Mute collision sounds for secret/hidden rolls.
Allow flavor text to influence colorset selection.
DICETOWER.Settings.rollingArea.Name: Rollable Area
DICETOWER.Settings.rollingArea.Hint: Custom viewport bounds for dice throwing and rendering.
